titleStmt.title: SII 20.34: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 34. (B.K. No. 73 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 975. Vijaya, Pushya, Puṇṇame, Sunday, Saṁkrānti. The details are irregular. The full moon day occurred on Tuesday, December 28, A.D. 1053, and the Saṁkrānti (i.e. Makara Saṁkrānti) occurred on Friday, December 24.

The inscription records a gift of toll-income to god Sōmēśvara of Kalkere, for offerings and burning oil-lamp, by the several officers of Kuppuṭūraṭhāṇe and the Tiḷivaḷḷiya ṭhāṇe at the command of Mahāmātya Sōmanāthayya, the perggaḍe of Vaḍḍarāvuḷa Mahamātya Vāvaṇayya, the perggaḍe of Perjjuṁka and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kīrtivarmmadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvalla
bhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyama
lladēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapada
vīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa
śrīmat vaḍḍarāvuḷada perggaḍe sōmanāthayyaṁgaḷa besade kuppuṭūraṭṭhāṇeya
da Adhiṣṭāyakaṁ nāgavarmmayyanuṁ mādhavabhaṭṭaruṁ sēnabōva saṁkimayyanuṁ
svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnatapra
bhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa śrīmat perjjuṁkada perggaḍe vāvaṇayyaṁ
gaḷabesade tiḷivaḷḷiyaṭṭhāṇeyada Adhiṣṭhāyakaṁ nāgavarmmayyanuṁ sēnabōva siṁga
yyanuṁ barmmayyanuṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsi
puravarēśvaraṁ permmaṭṭipaṟeghōśaṇaṁ mūvaḍijūjunāmādi samastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kīrttivarmmadēvara besade tiḷivaḷḷiya ṭṭhāṇeya
da bilkoḍeya Adhiṣṭhāyakaṁ raviyapayyanuṁ sēnabōva nēmayyanuṁ kunda
yyanuṁ Antanibarumiḷdu svasti sakavarṣa 975 neya vijaya saṁvatsarada puśya
da puṇname Ādityavāramuṁ saṁkrāntiyuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍida puṇyadinadandu
bēgēriyalkeṟeya bīḍina kakāṁciseṭṭiya keṟeya sōmēśvara dēvargge nivēdyakkaṁ
soḍareṇṇegaṁ khaṇḍasthuṭitakkendu vaḍḍarāvuḷaṁ ṭāṇōghasahitaṁ perjuṁkaṁ bilkoḍe Eraḍokka
ldeṟe kōḍavīsavasahitaṁ mūṟuṁ sunkadoḷamāgi biṭṭa Uppina hēṟu Ayvattu Ī
yanubhavaṇeya Ārorbba naḍevaravarade dharma Ī dharmamaṁ kaikoṇḍu naḍeyisuva
dātāraṁ manneya kāyiṁmmaseṭṭi Ī dharmmamanārobbaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsi
yoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirbba brāhmaṇargubhayamukhigoṭṭa pha
ḷamakku . Ī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētra brāhmaṇarumaṁ
sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvartapōdhanarumana kanakku . ©
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pā nētāṁ bhāginaḥ pā
rtthivēndrāṁn bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma bhuktā rāja
bhi sagarādibhi yasya yasya yadā paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁndarā śaṣṭhirvvarṣa na viṣaṁ viṣa
mityāhu dēvasvaṁ viṣamuccya putrapautri
kaṁ . © Ī kallaṁ saṁkōjaṁ māḍi
Digital edition of SII 20.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
